title: Q2 2024 Engineering All-Hands Meeting Agenda
author: Jennifer Walsh, CTO

sections.heading: Welcome and Opening Remarks
sections.content: Jennifer Walsh will open the meeting with organizational updates and key priorities for Q2 2024.

sections.heading: Q1 2024 Review
sections.content: Review of Q1 accomplishments, missed targets, and key learnings across all engineering teams.

sections.heading: Infrastructure Team Update
sections.content: Carlos Mendoza will present the Kubernetes migration status and upcoming cloud cost optimization initiatives.

sections.heading: Platform Team Update
sections.content: Aisha Thompson will cover data pipeline improvements and ML model deployment automation.

sections.heading: Q2 2024 Goals and OKRs
sections.content: Presentation of engineering OKRs for Q2 with alignment to company-wide objectives.

sections.heading: Open Discussion
sections.content: Q&A session. All attendees are encouraged to submit questions in advance via the shared document.

action_items_from_previous: Resolve Kubernetes namespace quota issue (Carlos - DONE)
Complete ML model versioning spec (Aisha - IN PROGRESS)
Update hiring plan for Q2 (Jennifer - DONE)
